subject: Fwd: Permits
body:
>From Amerling.  I will let you know when we have a firm date of ACOE  
arrival.  We have heard about such inspections in the past and nothing has  happened, 
but I would rather you know in advance of any such inspection.  
 
I have already told John that, as part of his engagement  letter, he needs to 
provide a list of outstanding permits and approvals.  and a detailed 
schedule, step by step, of milestones that he must accomplish in  order to obtain such 
permits and approvals.  He is preparing that schedule  and I have pushed him 
to get it for me by tomorrow. 
 
Darren K.  Indyke
Attorney-At-Law
457 Madison Avenue
4th Floor
New York, New  York 10022
Tel: 212-750-1176
Fax: 212-750-0381
e-mail: _dkiesq@aol.com_ (mailto:dkiesq@aol.com)

From: "John Amerling" <john_amerling@earthlink.net>
Subject: Permits
Date: Thu, 10 Apr 2008 14:55:59 GMT
To: DKIESQ@aol.com

Amy called me shortly after you called her. She has the file and will give
me comments on Friday. She is prepared to meet with me at ACOE as soon as we
finish off these documents.  You should be aware that ACOE is planning
inspections later this month. LSJ will surely be targeted. The fountain in
the pond will become a target, I am sure. Amy can and will get information
on when the excursion is planned. 

 

Lafayette Contractors, LLC

6100 Red Hook Quarters, Suite A2-7

St. Thomas, VI 00802

340 779-8054 (O)

340 779-8055 (FAX)

340 690-7194 (Cell)
body_html:
From Amerling.  I will let you know when we have a firm date of ACOE arrival.  We have heard about such inspections in the past and nothing has happened, but I would rather you know in advance of any such inspection. 
 
I have already told John that, as part of his engagement letter, he needs to provide a list of outstanding permits and approvals. and a detailed schedule, step by step, of milestones that he must accomplish in order to obtain such permits and approvals.  He is preparing that schedule and I have pushed him to get it for me by tomorrow. 
 
Darren K. Indyke
Attorney-At-Law
457 Madison Avenue
4th Floor
New York, New York 10022
Tel: 212-750-1176
Fax: 212-750-0381
e-mail: dkiesq@aol.com

Amy called me shortly after you called her. She has the file and will give me comments on Friday. She is prepared to meet with me at ACOE as soon as we finish off these documents.  You should be aware that ACOE is planning inspections later this month. LSJ will surely be targeted. The fountain in the pond will become a target, I am sure. Amy can and will get information on when the excursion is planned.
